历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 18170 → 27593 → 25480 → 26297 → 26572, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 8400 places in the last 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 26572; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 196 in 2021, 199 in 2022, 199 in 2023, 212 in 2024, and 225 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 239, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is about 55th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 49 and 55, overall stable; recent reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 102, with average evaluation and low short video exposure; no record of enrollment gaps; Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A-, Animal Science A-, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, providing stable attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, but the university's main body is agricultural and forestry majors, with overall average popularity; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province is about 313,000, a slight decrease of about 2.4% compared to 325,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, adjacent to Anhui, with strong regional attraction for Anhui candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in the province is relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 6.2% leading to a backward shift in ranking, a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates in the province easing competition, stable university reputation, and positive regional preference; the predicted minimum ranking is about 27594, with a range of 27094–28094.
